ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., car, truck, bus) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Tesla, Waymo, Cruise) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Model S, Chrysler Pacifica) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number for unique identification */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number for identification */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., electric, diesel) */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed the vehicle can achieve */,
  "last_maintenance" REAL /* Timestamp of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" REAL /* Timestamp of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the sensor is installed on */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the vehicle */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" REAL /* Timestamp of when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" REAL /* Timestamp of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle */,
  "curvature" REAL /* Curvature of the road */,
  "curvature_change_rate" REAL /* Rate of change of curvature */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if the sensor is malfunctioning */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading direction of the vehicle */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the vehicle */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control system */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the control system is installed on */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the control system (e.g., gear shift, throttle, brake, steering) */,
  "system_model" TEXT /* Model of the control system */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the control system */,
  "installation_date" REAL /* Timestamp of when the control system was installed */,
  "calibration_date" REAL /* Timestamp of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the control system (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_systems_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control system that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "gear" INTEGER /* Current gear of the vehicle */,
  "throttle" REAL /* Throttle input */,
  "brake" REAL /* Brake input */,
  "steering" REAL /* Steering input */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the control system */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the control system */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if the control system is malfunctioning */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading direction of the vehicle */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the vehicle */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES control_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that made the trip */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the trip */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken during the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trip */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Start location of the trip */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* End location of the trip */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed during the trip */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the trip */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during the trip */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the trip */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip that the data was collected during */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the vehicle's position */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle */,
  "curvature" REAL /* Curvature of the road */,
  "curvature_change_rate" REAL /* Rate of change of curvature */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the vehicle */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the vehicle */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if the vehicle is malfunctioning */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading direction of the vehicle */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the vehicle */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_data_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Start location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* End location of the route */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Typical weather conditions on the route */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Typical road conditions on the route */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Typical traffic conditions on the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route that the segment belongs to */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the segment */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the segment */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Start location of the segment */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* End location of the segment */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Typical weather conditions on the segment */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Typical road conditions on the segment */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Typical traffic conditions on the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_segments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" REAL /* Timestamp of when the user registered */,
  "last_login" REAL /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips made by the user */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trip */,
  "trip_date" REAL /* Date of the trip */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Start location of the trip */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* End location of the trip */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed during the trip */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the trip */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during the trip */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the trip */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
